topics.name: Foundation Models
topics.query: all:"robot foundation model" OR all:"embodied foundation model" OR all:"OpenVLA" OR all:"RT-2"

topics.name: Vision-Language-Action
topics.query: all:"vision language action" OR all:"VLA" OR all:"pi0" OR all:"DexVLA"

topics.name: Embodied Agents
topics.query: all:"embodied agent" OR all:"robot planning" OR all:"SayCan" OR all:"Voyager"

topics.name: Manipulation
topics.query: all:"robot manipulation" OR all:"diffusion policy" OR all:"bimanual manipulation"

topics.name: Navigation & Spatial
topics.query: all:"embodied navigation" OR all:"spatial reasoning" OR all:"Habitat"
